user_agents.name: OAI-SearchBot
user_agents.purpose: Surface websites in ChatGPT search results
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for search indexing in ChatGPT's search features

user_agents.name: GPTBot
user_agents.purpose: Training data collection for generative AI foundation models
user_agents.scope: Crawl content for training OpenAI's generative AI foundation models

user_agents.name: OAI-AdsBot
user_agents.purpose: Validate safety of web pages submitted as ads on ChatGPT
user_agents.scope: Only visits pages submitted as ads; validates compliance with policies

user_agents.name: ChatGPT-User
user_agents.purpose: User-triggered web page fetching for ChatGPT and Custom GPTs
user_agents.scope: User-initiated fetches for live responses; not automatic web crawling
user_agents.opt_out: Not managed via robots.txt; user-initiated requests

user_agents.name: ClaudeBot
user_agents.purpose: Enhance utility and safety of generative AI models by collecting web content for training.
user_agents.scope: Collects web content for AI model training datasets from the public web.
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: ClaudeBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt, or use Crawl-delay directive.

user_agents.name: Claude-User
user_agents.purpose: Support Claude AI users by accessing websites when individuals ask questions to Claude.
user_agents.scope: User-initiated web retrieval when Claude users ask questions requiring current web content.
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Claude-User / Disallow: / in robots.txt file.

user_agents.name: Claude-SearchBot
user_agents.purpose: Navigate the web to improve search result quality and enhance relevance and accuracy of search responses.
user_agents.scope: Analyzes online content to enhance relevance and accuracy of search results for users.
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Claude-SearchBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt file.

user_agents.name: Googlebot
user_agents.purpose: Building Google Search indexes, search features, and product-specific crawls
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for Google Search, Discover, Images, Video, News

user_agents.name: Googlebot-Image
user_agents.purpose: Crawling images for Google Images and Search
user_agents.scope: Image-related content in Google Search, Discover, Video features

user_agents.name: Googlebot-Video
user_agents.purpose: Crawling videos for Google Search and video features
user_agents.scope: Video-related Google Search features and video-dependent products

user_agents.name: Googlebot-News
user_agents.purpose: Crawling content for Google News product
user_agents.scope: News-related content for Google News and news.google.com

user_agents.name: Storebot-Google
user_agents.purpose: Crawling content for Google Shopping
user_agents.scope: Product information for Google Shopping and Shopping tabs in Search

user_agents.name: Google-InspectionTool
user_agents.purpose: Testing and inspection for Search Console tools
user_agents.scope: User-triggered fetches for Rich Result Test and URL inspection tools

user_agents.name: GoogleOther
user_agents.purpose: Generic crawling for various Google product teams and research
user_agents.scope: One-off crawls for internal R&D and product-specific content fetching

user_agents.name: GoogleOther-Image
user_agents.purpose: Generic image URL fetching for various Google product teams
user_agents.scope: Publicly accessible image URLs for internal R&D purposes

user_agents.name: GoogleOther-Video
user_agents.purpose: Generic video URL fetching for various Google product teams
user_agents.scope: Publicly accessible video URLs for internal R&D purposes

user_agents.name: Google-CloudVertexBot
user_agents.purpose: Crawling for building Vertex AI Agents at site owners' request
user_agents.scope: Crawls requested by site owners for Vertex AI Agent development

user_agents.name: Google-Extended
user_agents.purpose: Training Gemini models and grounding in Gemini products
user_agents.scope: Content for Gemini Apps, Vertex AI API, and grounding with Google Search

user_agents.name: PerplexityBot
user_agents.purpose: Surface and link websites in search results on Perplexity
user_agents.scope: Perplexity search results; not used for training AI foundation models
user_agents.opt_out: Disallow PerplexityBot in robots.txt; configure WAF to block or exclude from IP whitelist

user_agents.name: Perplexity-User
user_agents.purpose: Support user-triggered web fetches when users ask Perplexity questions
user_agents.scope: User-requested page visits to provide accurate answers; ignores robots.txt rules
user_agents.opt_out: Configure WAF to block or exclude Perplexity-User from IP whitelist; user-triggered fetches generally bypass robots.txt

user_agents.name: Applebot
user_agents.purpose: Powers search technology in Spotlight, Siri, and Safari across Apple ecosystem
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for search indexing and rendering across Apple products
user_agents.opt_out: Disallow Applebot in robots.txt; Applebot respects standard robots.txt directives and follows Googlebot instructions if Applebot not specified

user_agents.name: Applebot-Extended
user_agents.purpose: Determines data usage for training Apple foundation models powering Apple Intelligence and generative AI features
user_agents.scope: Does not crawl webpages; analyzes data already crawled by Applebot for AI model training
user_agents.opt_out: Disallow Applebot-Extended in robots.txt to opt-out of content being used for generative AI model training

user_agents.name: iTMS
user_agents.purpose: Crawls Apple Podcasts registered content for podcast discovery
user_agents.scope: Only crawls URLs associated with registered content on Apple Podcasts; does not follow robots.txt
user_agents.opt_out: No documented opt-out mechanism; does not follow robots.txt as not a general search crawler

user_agents.name: FacebookExternalHit
user_agents.purpose: Crawl shared content for social media display (title, description, thumbnail)
user_agents.scope: Content shared on Facebook, Instagram, Messenger via link sharing or social plugins
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: facebookexternalhit / Disallow: / (may bypass for security checks)

user_agents.name: Meta-WebIndexer
user_agents.purpose: Improve Meta AI search result quality and citation/linking in responses
user_agents.scope: General web crawl to enhance AI search relevance and accuracy

user_agents.name: Meta-ExternalAds
user_agents.purpose: Improve advertising and business-related products and services
user_agents.scope: Web crawl for advertising and business-related use cases

user_agents.name: Meta-ExternalAgent
user_agents.purpose: Train foundation AI models and improve products via content indexing
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for AI model training and product improvement

user_agents.name: Meta-ExternalFetcher
user_agents.purpose: User-triggered fetching to support agentic AI capabilities for task completion
user_agents.scope: Individual link fetches at user request; may bypass robots.txt
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: meta-externalfetcher / Disallow: / (may bypass per user requests)

user_agents.name: Amazonbot
user_agents.purpose: Improve Amazon products and services, train AI models
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for product improvement and data collection
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Amazonbot / Disallow: / in robots.txt; honors robots meta tags (noarchive, noindex, none)

user_agents.name: Amzn-SearchBot
user_agents.purpose: Improve search experiences in Amazon products and services
user_agents.scope: Crawls for search index in Alexa and Rufus; does not train generative AI
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Amzn-SearchBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt; honors robots meta tags

user_agents.name: Amzn-User
user_agents.purpose: Support user actions and live information fetching for Alexa queries
user_agents.scope: User-triggered fetch for live, up-to-date web information; does not train AI
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Amzn-User / Disallow: / in robots.txt; honors robots meta tags

user_agents.name: CCBot/2.0
user_agents.purpose: Web crawling for Common Crawl research dataset
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for Common Crawl corpus; supports Sitemap Protocol
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: CCBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt file

user_agents.name: CCBot/1.0
user_agents.purpose: Legacy web crawling for Common Crawl research dataset
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for Common Crawl corpus; older version
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: CCBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt file
